name: distObjContainerRef::PushBack
title: distObjContainerRef::PushBack
description: Adds an element at the end of the container.
It requires that <Typedef name> refers to a list type.
The first overload is available for lists of objects and references. It appends a default object or reference.
Form 2 and 3 are only available when <Typedef name> refers to a (nested) list of references. Here the parameter can be used to directly set the target of the new reference.
Form 4 is only available when <Typedef name> refers to a (nested) list of objects.

parameters.name: path
parameters.description: Fully qualified name of the target object.

parameters.name: blueprint
parameters.description: Blueprint which is used for object creation.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
